name: tramp-rpc-remediation
description: Serial, test-gated remediation of the Lisp/Rust review findings with Luna for complex reasoning and Terra for bounded implementation and validation.

chain.label: Validate scope and sequence
chain.task: Read doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md, AGENTS.md, README.org, and the relevant Lisp/Rust/tests. Validate the milestone ordering against the current code and produce a concise execution map. Do not edit project/source files. Call out dependencies between findings, protocol-compatibility risks, and the exact focused tests each milestone needs. Treat the workflow document as approved scope; escalate only if a required API or architecture decision is not covered. Additional run request: {task}

chain.label: Repair the validation baseline
chain.task: You are the sole writer. Implement Milestone 0 from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md, guided by {outputs.executionPlan}. Fix the protocol selector, stale tests, order-dependent state, and unsupported-Tramp skip behavior. Keep changes limited to validation infrastructure and tests. Run the entire Milestone 0 test ladder, confirm non-zero executed counts, and repair failures before finishing. Do not proceed by accepting skipped tests as success.

parallel.label: Review test reliability
parallel.task: Review the current Milestone 0 diff for test reliability and regressions. Inspect the implementation directly. Do not modify project/source files. Verify that zero-test and mass-skip runs cannot pass and that stale/order-dependent tests were corrected rather than hidden. Run focused checks where useful. Return pass/fail findings with exact file:line evidence. Implementation handoff: {outputs.m0Implementation}

parallel.label: Rerun baseline tests
parallel.task: Act as an independent test validator. Do not modify project/source files. Run the Milestone 0 test ladder from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md. Record commands, exit codes, executed/skipped counts, and environmental blockers. A zero-test or unexpectedly skipped run is a failure, not a pass. Implementation handoff: {outputs.m0Implementation}

chain.label: Stabilize validation baseline
chain.task:
You are the sole writer. Apply all concrete fixes worth doing now from the Milestone 0 review and test reports. Do not start Milestone 1. If no code fix is needed, still rerun the failed or critical commands and report evidence. Review: {outputs.m0Review}

Tests: {outputs.m0Tests}

chain.label: Fix file and RPC semantics
chain.task: You are the sole writer. First confirm the Milestone 0 baseline is green from {outputs.m0Stable}. Then implement only Milestone 1 from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md: integer-offset write-region semantics, directory COUNT behavior, root execute semantics, pipelined timeout errors, precise exit-127 mapping, dangling-symlink no-overwrite rename with structured EEXIST, dynamic supplementary groups, and bounded read allocations. Add focused regression tests for every fix. Run focused tests and the full test ladder before finishing.

parallel.label: Review file/RPC semantics
parallel.task: Review the current Milestone 1 diff for exact Emacs file API semantics, RPC error mapping, edge cases, and regressions. Do not modify project/source files. Run targeted reproductions where useful and cite exact file:line findings. Implementation handoff: {outputs.m1Implementation}

parallel.label: Rerun semantic tests
parallel.task: Independently run all Milestone 1 focused tests plus the test ladder. Do not modify project/source files. Report commands, exit codes, test counts, skipped tests, and blockers. Implementation handoff: {outputs.m1Implementation}

chain.label: Stabilize file/RPC semantics
chain.task:
You are the sole writer. Apply concrete Milestone 1 review fixes, remain within Milestone 1 scope, and rerun focused and broad tests. Review: {outputs.m1Review}

Tests: {outputs.m1Tests}

chain.label: Fix synchronous Rust process lifecycle
chain.task: You are the sole writer. Confirm Milestone 1 is green from {outputs.m1Stable}, then implement only Milestone 2 from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md. Focus on null stdin, concurrent stdin/output, JoinSet reaping and bounded concurrency, parse-vs-invalid-request errors, final EOF cleanup, and child reaping. Add deterministic regression/stress tests. Run Rust checks, Lisp protocol/server integration checks, byte compilation, and the broad test ladder.

parallel.label: Review Rust process concurrency
parallel.task: Review Milestone 2 for deadlocks, task leaks, zombie processes, output loss, protocol error correctness, and bounded resource use. Do not modify project/source files. Inspect tests and run targeted checks. Handoff: {outputs.m2Implementation}

parallel.label: Run Rust and integration tests
parallel.task: Independently run Milestone 2 regression tests, cargo fmt/test/clippy, protocol tests, local-server integration tests, and byte compilation. Do not modify project/source files. Report exact evidence and blockers. Handoff: {outputs.m2Implementation}

chain.label: Stabilize Rust process lifecycle
chain.task:
You are the sole writer. Apply all concrete Milestone 2 fixes and rerun the full Milestone 2 validation set. Review: {outputs.m2Review}

Tests: {outputs.m2Tests}

chain.label: Fix async transport cleanup and coding
chain.task: You are the sole writer. Confirm Milestone 2 is green from {outputs.m2Stable}, then implement only Milestone 3 from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md. Address connection-qualified queues, callback cleanup races, explicit queue-drain failure, transport-death sentinel cleanup, remote process termination/reaping, closed-stdin errors, and exact process coding-system behavior with raw bytes. Add multi-connection, transport-death, binary, Latin-1, and slow-write regression tests. Run the full test ladder and relevant temporary-directory remote tests when configured.

parallel.label: Review async transport and coding
parallel.task: Review Milestone 3 for cross-connection contamination, callback/queue races, transport-death cleanup, data loss, and exact Emacs coding semantics. Do not modify project/source files. Cite concrete evidence and run focused reproductions. Handoff: {outputs.m3Implementation}

parallel.label: Run async/coding regressions
parallel.task: Independently run Milestone 3 focused tests and the full test ladder, including binary/non-UTF-8 and transport-death cases. Use temporary remote deployment paths for remote tests. Do not modify project/source files. Report exact evidence. Handoff: {outputs.m3Implementation}

chain.label: Stabilize async transport and coding
chain.task:
You are the sole writer. Apply concrete Milestone 3 review fixes and rerun focused, broad, and configured remote tests. Review: {outputs.m3Review}

Tests: {outputs.m3Tests}

chain.label: Fix PTY correctness and concurrency
chain.task: You are the sole writer. Confirm Milestone 3 is green from {outputs.m3Stable}, then implement only Milestone 4 from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md. Guarantee ordered complete PTY writes, remove registry-lock awaits, drain PTY output through EOF after child exit, terminate on RPC read errors, eliminate raw-fd lifetime races, and reap children. Add stress tests for large paste/write backpressure, large final output, concurrent kill/close, and read errors. Run Rust, Lisp, integration, byte-compile, and configured remote PTY tests.

parallel.label: Review PTY concurrency
parallel.task: Review Milestone 4 for partial/reordered writes, output truncation, lock inversion, fd reuse, close/kill races, and zombie processes. Do not modify project/source files. Inspect and run stress tests. Handoff: {outputs.m4Implementation}

parallel.label: Run PTY stress tests
parallel.task: Independently run Milestone 4 PTY stress/regression tests and the full test ladder. Run configured remote PTY tests using a temporary deployment directory. Do not modify project/source files. Report exact evidence. Handoff: {outputs.m4Implementation}

chain.label: Stabilize PTY implementation
chain.task:
You are the sole writer. Apply concrete Milestone 4 review fixes and rerun PTY stress, broad, and configured remote tests. Review: {outputs.m4Review}

Tests: {outputs.m4Tests}

chain.label: Harden deployment and consolidate safely
chain.task: You are the sole writer. Confirm Milestone 4 is green from {outputs.m4Stable}, then implement only Milestone 5 from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md. Require release checksum verification or source-build fallback, check remote activation command success, align README method documentation, and perform only low-risk deduplication supported by existing regression tests. Remove only demonstrably unused private helpers. Run deployment-focused tests, the full local ladder, and configured temporary-directory remote deployment tests.

parallel.label: Review deployment and consolidation
parallel.task: Review Milestone 5 for supply-chain safety, deployment failure handling, documentation accuracy, and refactor regressions. Do not modify project/source files. Cite exact evidence and run focused checks. Handoff: {outputs.m5Implementation}

parallel.label: Run deployment and full tests
parallel.task: Independently run deployment-focused tests and the complete test ladder. If configured, test deployment only in a temporary remote directory. Do not modify project/source files. Report commands, exit codes, counts, and blockers. Handoff: {outputs.m5Implementation}

chain.label: Stabilize deployment and cleanup
chain.task:
You are the sole writer. Apply concrete Milestone 5 review fixes and rerun deployment-focused and broad validation. Review: {outputs.m5Review}

Tests: {outputs.m5Tests}

parallel.label: Final correctness and regression review
parallel.task: Perform a fresh final review of the complete working-copy diff against doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md. Do not modify project/source files. Focus on correctness, concurrency, lifecycle, protocol compatibility, security, and missing regression tests. Report blockers and smallest safe fixes with exact file:line evidence. Final milestone handoff: {outputs.m5Stable}

parallel.label: Final simplicity and maintainability review
parallel.task: Perform a fresh final review of the complete diff for unnecessary complexity, duplicated logic, dead code, and test maintainability. Do not modify project/source files. Do not request optional polish unless it materially reduces risk. Cite exact evidence.

parallel.label: Run final test matrix
parallel.task: Run the complete final acceptance test matrix from doc/REMEDIATION_WORKFLOW.md. Do not modify project/source files. Record exact commands, exit codes, executed/skipped counts, remote-test status, and environment information. Zero-test or mass-skip runs are failures.

chain.label: Apply final accepted fixes
Independent final acceptance
chain.task: Independently inspect the final diff and rerun the complete acceptance matrix. Do not modify project/source files. Return a concise PASS/FAIL report with exact commands, exit codes, test counts, skipped tests, remote-test status, and any residual blocker. Final implementation handoff: {outputs.finalImplementation}
